verification_center_enabled.description: System 39: Master gate for the Verification Center tab. Enable for internal beta first.

identity_verification_enabled.description: System 39: Identity (KYC) verification. MUST remain false until KYC provider is fully integrated and tested.

organization_verification_enabled.description: System 39: Organization verification via domain email challenge.

role_verification_enabled.description: System 39: Role verification (Pastor, Youth Leader, etc.) within organizations.

creator_verification_enabled.description: System 39: Creator verification badge. Requires identity verification to be active first.

public_trust_badges_enabled.description: System 39: Show trust badges on public profiles. Enable after at least one verification type is live.

impersonation_reports_enabled.description: System 39: Allow users to file impersonation reports. Enable once moderation queue is staffed.

version.description: System 39: Verification & Trust — initial deploy (all flags false)
